name: DigitalOcean Startups
summary: DigitalOcean Startups empowers AI startups to scale with affordable infrastructure and exclusive benefits.
benefits: Expert one-on-ones with DigitalOcean product managers and engineers
Free access to Standard-tier paid support for 15 months
eligibility: Partner or accelerator affiliation may be required.
